name: Bean Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried kidney beans (cooked, unsalted, drained)
recipeInstructions:
- Prepare two servings, each with about 1 cup filling and 1/3 cup cornmeal mush.
- Each serving contains approximately 296 calories.
1. Cook green pepper and onion in a small (8-inch) frying pan over low heat until tender.
2. Stir in beans, tomato puree, corn, one and a half teaspoons chili powder, and one-eighth teaspoon salt.
3. Cover and cook over low heat for about 15 minutes until the flavors are well blended.
4. Mix cornmeal, water, and one-sixteenth teaspoon salt.
5. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until very thick (about 3 minutes).
6. Spread cornmeal mush over the bean mixture to form a crust.
7. Sprinkle one-fourth teaspoon chili powder over the top of the crust.
8. Cook over low heat with the lid slightly open for about 7 minutes until the topping is set.
Note: One cup canned kidney beans (drained) can be used instead of cooked dried kidney beans; omit the one-eighth teaspoon salt in step 2. Each serving contains approximately 270 calories.
